title: Create: Man Face Smart Observer
body:
# Behold!
For the beauty of the distinguished stare has been made lain afront, a testament. And yet as sacred as it appears, it dwells in the plane of our own, giving new life into your factory, beholden now only to the divine machine.

This resource pack is endorsed by the [Smart Observer Cult](https://discord.gg/vuCWnJTvvV)
